# Ducia Project Template

This repository is intended to be used as a starting point for small doc sites backed by a Rust API and a React frontend.

When creating a new repository from this template, update the following:

- `backend/Cargo.toml` -> set `repository`, `authors`, and other metadata.
- `LICENSE` -> set the correct copyright holder.
- Remove example docs in `docs/` and update `config/` as needed.
